author: natasha
title: Little light of mine
body: I love it, small but brightens the room well.

author: mvillarreal
title: Landfillcore
body: Don’t bother with this junk. You can’t replace the bulb when it goes out, so it needs to be trashed!!!! So basically, it’s a disposable lamp. So wasteful!

author: Not really worth it
title: Does Not Last
body: This light worked well for about 2 years before it started very aggresivly flickering when you turn it on. it also turned on once in the middle of the light while it was fully off. And they dont have any way for you to access the light bulb or fix it.

author: Jr
body: I thought this was cordless. Wrong! Be aware that it isn't. Still, it looked nice in my space and while I didn't think it's worth 40 bucks I kept it. Then I knocked it over. It shattered easily. 40 bucks for a week of lighting. Oh well.

author: Jackie
title: Good lamp but wish it's warmer light
body: Good function and pretty small size lamp. I wish the color of the light was more on the warm side. Going to try it out as part of newborn’s middle of the night chang up set up. However, majority suggests using red light or warm light so I am hesitant to say this is a good option for this set up.

author: tabetha
body: cute little lamp. love the brightness for the size and the dimming function

author: Julia
title: Night light
body: Very warm light so great for reading.
